title: End-to-end schema family: Product, LineItem, Order, Invoice with full discipline
prompt: Build a four-schema e-commerce family applying ALL the family's rules at once: (1) MyApp.Catalog.Product (:decimal price with precision/scale, unique SKU, utc timestamps) (lib/my_app/catalog/product.ex); (2) MyApp.Orders.LineItem as embedded_schema embedded in Order with unit_price (:decimal) + quantity + product_id (lib/my_app/orders/line_item.ex); (3) MyApp.Orders.Order (embeds_many :line_items, :customer_email, status Ecto.Enum, has custom validator for at-least-one-item) (lib/my_app/orders/order.ex); (4) MyApp.Billing.Invoice with plain :order_id (NOT belongs_to — Billing is a separate context from Orders), subtotal/tax/total as :decimal, custom validator total == Decimal.add(subtotal, tax) using Decimal.equal? (lib/my_app/billing/invoice.ex). All four must use UTC timestamps. No :float anywhere.
tier_rationale: Maximum-scope synthesis of the entire family's rules across four coordinated schemas. Legendary because any single discipline break contaminates the whole.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin + oliver-kriska Iron Laws + Ecto embedded schemas guide.
